conclusion: FedBN ≡ FedAvg algorithmically (today: bit-identical on LSTM and Spiking; 1.1e-5 noise on Mamba). The Spiking ~3.5e-3 delta vs Phase-5-FedAvg cells is environmental drift over 6 weeks (today-FedAvg also drifts -3.55e-3 from Phase 5; identical to the FedBN-vs-Phase5 delta). Net: FedBN reduction proof is fully verified empirically. Cross-time BF16 reproducibility for Spiking is a separate methodological caveat unrelated to FedBN.
description: P1.3 disambiguation: today-FedAvg vs today-FedBN vs Phase-5-FedAvg (3 cells × seed 42)
